title: hieracium porrectum subsp. alfenzinum
intro: Hieracium porrectum subsp. alfenzinum is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium porrectum subsp. alfenzinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
